name: Baked Indian Pudding (Ai)
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk.
2. Mix together the cornmeal and molasses and stir into the hot milk.
3. Cook until it thickens, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
4. Add the sugar, egg, butter, salt, ginger, and cinnamon. Mix thoroughly.
5. Pour into a buttered baking dish.
6. Bake for 1/2 hour at 300 degrees.
7. Pour over one cup of milk and continue baking for 2 hours.
8. Serve with cream or ice cream.
